title: Catastrophe
body:
# **All of the Features of Catastrophe**

## **Weapons:**

- Scythes + Varients
- Voidblade + Varients
- Steampunk axe
- Squeaky toy hammer
 

## **Items:**

- Void Bottle
- Creative exclusive test items
- Box of cards + All Aces

## **Enchantments:**

- Bounce (Applies to Scythes)
- Voidening (Applies to Void Blades)
- Athazagoraphobia (Applies to Void Blades)
- Harpooning (Applies to Steampunk Axe)

## **Blocks:**

- Cosmetic Table
